name: Tarai
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>陀</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>タ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ラ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>威</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 face-up monster in the Main Monster Zone that has activated its effect on the field this turn; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon this card to the zone that monster was in. You can only use this effect of "Tarai" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 face-up monster in the Main Monster Zone that has activated its effect on the field this turn; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon this card to the zone that monster was in. You can only use this effect of "Tarai" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your hand: You can target 1 face-up monster in the Main Monster Zone that has activated its effect on the field this turn; destroy it, and if you do, Special Summon this card to the zone that monster was in. You can only use this effect of "Tarai" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your hand to your opponent's field
